mode_selection_policy: Ask the run-mode startup question as part of the four-question startup gate, from loosest to strictest: full-auto, autonomous, guided, strict-gated. Do not record a formal mode until the user explicitly answers; a compact later reply may supply all four startup answers at once. Do not infer a default mode, display surface, or fallback from invocation text, existing .flowpilot state, host limitations, or prior routes.
safe_automatic_install_policy: Project-local, reversible, non-secret tools and libraries may be installed automatically only through the current packet authority when needed for the active node, current chunk, or declared checks. Startup records a dependency plan and installs only minimal FlowPilot/check tooling; future dependencies are deferred until needed.
